summary: Concept phase PASSED. Both story-concept.json and craft-profile.json are well-crafted and fully aligned with story-config.json. Zero critical findings, zero major findings, 3 minor findings: (1) T10 missing beta-reading enforcement phase, (2) Act II chapter allocation slightly compressed for story density, (3) one non-genre comp title. All 8 world-seed concepts faithfully transformed with original names. All 5 required tropes present. All 4 user themes mapped to thematic pillars. 16 craft tools selected with story-specific rationales covering all structurally critical needs. No forbidden world-seed names found. No darlings identified. Phase may proceed to worldbuilding.
